title: helianthemum × sulphureum var. ochroleucum
intro: Helianthemum × sulphureum var. ochroleucum, also known as the rockrose or yellow rockrose, is a plant species in the Cistaceae family, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and woody stems. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Helianthemum × sulphureum var. ochroleucum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. This plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support cardiovascular health, immune function, and overall well-being.
